headline: Latest ‘Star Wars’ Film ‘Mandalorian’ Debuts at $100 Million
summary: (Bloomberg) -- The Mandalorian and Grogu, the first film in the Star Wars franchise in seven years, was the highest-grossing movie in the US and Canada over the four-day holiday weekend with $100 million in ticket sales.
